name: Sabatiel - The Philosopher's Stone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サバティエル
desc: If you have a "Winged Kuriboh" monster in your GY: Pay half your LP; add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can banish 3 copies of "Sabatiel - The Philosopher's Stone" from your GY, then target 1 monster on the field; it gains ATK equal to the ATK of the monster on the field with the highest ATK (your choice, if tied), until the end of this turn.
eff: If you have a "Winged Kuriboh" monster in your GY: Pay half your LP; add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand.
